---
title: "Welcome to Dotfiles Documentation"
---

## Hello World! 👋

This is the documentation site for my personal dotfiles repository.

### What's Inside

This repository contains my carefully curated development environment configurations:

- **LazyVim**: Neovim configuration with 150+ plugins and AI integration
- **Tmux + Sesh**: Terminal multiplexing with session management
- **Wezterm**: Modern GPU-accelerated terminal emulator
- **Starship**: Fast, customizable shell prompt
- **Atuin**: Encrypted command history with sync

### Quick Start

```bash
# Clone the repository
git clone https://github.com/chuckpr/dotfiles.git
cd dotfiles

# Deploy configurations with GNU Stow
stow lazyvim
stow tmux
stow wezterm
stow starship
stow sesh
```

### Theme

Everything is themed with **Gruvbox Dark** for a consistent visual experience across all tools.

::: {.callout-note}
This site is built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org) and deployed automatically via GitHub Actions.
:::

### Next Steps

- Learn more in [Getting Started](getting-started.qmd)
- Explore the [configuration sections](#configuration) in the sidebar
